description: 同 (tenantId, workerCode) 已存在 → 平台 idempotent 复用记录,SDK 同样进 ONLINE。重启场景常见(K8s pod recreate 但 workerCode 不变)

state.note: 平台 worker_registry 已有 (acme, w-1) 记录,status=OFFLINE(上次崩溃)

then.sdkExpectedAction: treat as success (200 = success regardless of conflict semantics); transition FSM to NORMAL; do not retry
sdkMustNot: treat 200 with existing record as error
send different workerCode on retry (workerCode must be stable across restarts for idempotency)
